title: Excelltec 4pk CR123A 3V Lithium Batteries – Long-Lasting Power for Cameras, Flashlights and High-Drain Devices, Reliable Multipurpose Battery Pack
features: Optimized for Doorbells: Unleash superior performance with our 23a 12v alkaline battery designed to power your doorbell seamlessly. Experience uninterrupted functionality with this 23A battery 12v or 23a 12v battery for doorbell and other devices.

More Than Just a Doorbell Battery: Each 23a battery boasts a meticulously crafted size of 10*28mm, ensuring a snug fit in your devices. An ideal, long lasting replacement 23A/A23 battery for remote controls for cars, garage doors, and other devices.
Ultra-Lightweight Power: Weighing just 8g each, our A23 batteries deliver impressive power without adding bulk. Designed for performance, reliability, and a perfect fit in every device.
A23G & L1028F Compatible: Our A23 battery is fully compatible with A23G and L1028F models — a versatile power solution that fits multiple devices with ease.
Extended Shelf Life: Each A23 12V battery offers long-lasting storage power, ensuring reliable performance whenever you need it. Stay ready and powered with dependable energy you can trust.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Power Up Your Device 2 Reliable Power Source Power Up Your Device with Our Range of Battery Products CR123A 3V Lithium Battery Add To Basket Excelltec PP3 9V Battery Add To Basket 20pk Alkaline Batteries Buying Options 6pk Lithium Coin Battery Add To Basket 16pk Lithium Batteries Add To Basket 8pk Lithium Batteries Add To Basket 4pk CR123A 3V Batteries Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 227 4.2 out of 5 stars 222 4.6 out of 5 stars 37 4.5 out of 5 stars 66 4.4 out of 5 stars 130 4.4 out of 5 stars 63 4.4 out of 5 stars 227 Price £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 — £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 Long Lasting ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Reliable Power ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ .Versatile ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Durable Battery ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Multipack ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What makes these CR123A batteries reliable? These batteries use 3V lithium technology for consistent power, ensuring long-lasting performance in various devices. What materials are used in these CR123A batteries? Crafted from high-quality graphite and aluminium, these batteries offer durability and optimal energy output. How long do these CR123A batteries last? With a high 3V voltage, these batteries provide extended use, reducing the frequency of replacements. Are these batteries compatible with other types? Yes, they are compatible as CR123A or CR17345, fitting a wide range of devices. What are the dimensions of these batteries? Each battery measures 33.5x16.2mm, an optimal size for various devices.
